ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {Regen:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain 1 additional [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ACCRETION.title: Accretion
ALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Hits an additional time.
[gold]Seep[/gold]: Gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ACCRUE.title: Accrue
ALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.description:
Lose all [gold]Poison[/gold].
Gain that much [gold]Regen[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:+1|}.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Citrinitas+[/green]|[gold]Citrinitas[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-ALBEDO.title: Albedo
ALCHEMIST-AMALGAM.description:
[gold]Ferment{FermentSuffix}.[/gold]
Apply X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Increase X by 1 for each turn fermented.{FermentTotal}
ALCHEMIST-AMALGAM.title: Amalgam
ALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Triple|Double} the [gold]Poison[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold] on ALL enemies and yourself.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Heal 2 HP.
ALCHEMIST-AMPLIFICATION.title: Amplification
ALCHEMIST-ASSIMILATE.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Poison[/gold] on everyone{IfUpgraded:show: [green]2 times[/green]|}.
ALCHEMIST-ASSIMILATE.title: Assimilate
ALCHEMIST-AUGUR.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage. Otherwise, lose 3 HP.
ALCHEMIST-AUGUR.title: Augur
ALCHEMIST-AUREATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Infuse[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-AUREATE.title: Aureate
ALCHEMIST-AZOTH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have 7 or more cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ALCHEMIST-AZOTH.title: Azoth
ALCHEMIST-BESTOW.description:
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a random card in another player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw 1 card.
ALCHEMIST-BESTOW.title: Bestow
ALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.description:
[gold]Ferment{FermentSuffix}.[/gold]
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:[green]100%[/green]|75%} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each turn fermented.
ALCHEMIST-CARAPACE.title: Carapace
ALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.description: The first time your HP changes each turn, [gold]Infuse[/gold] 2 random cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CATALYSE.title: Catalyse
ALCHEMIST-CATHARSIS.description:
[gold]Ferment{FermentSuffix}.[/gold]
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold], plus {Bonus:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold] for each turn fermented.{FermentTotal}
ALCHEMIST-CATHARSIS.title: Catharsis
ALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal that much damage{EnchantBonus} to ALL enemies {IfUpgraded:show:[green]3[/green]|2} times.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Rubedo+[/green]|[gold]Rubedo[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CITRINITAS.title: Citrinitas
ALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.description:
[gold]Ferment{FermentSuffix}.[/gold]
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage twice.
Deals {IfUpgraded:show:[green]100%[/green]|75%} additional damage for each turn fermented.
ALCHEMIST-COMPOUND.title: Compound
ALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CONGEAL.title: Congeal
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.description: At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Poison[/gold] or [gold]Regen[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ALCHEMIST-CONJUNCTION.title: Conjunction
ALCHEMIST-CONVULSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Trigger [gold]Poison[/gold] on the enemy.
ALCHEMIST-CONVULSE.title: Convulse
ALCHEMIST-CORNERED.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage. Otherwise, lose 5 HP.
ALCHEMIST-CORNERED.title: Cornered
ALCHEMIST-CORRODE.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain {Regen:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
[gold]Seep[/gold]: Gain {SelfPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-CORRODE.title: Corrode
ALCHEMIST-CULTURE.description:
[gold]Ferment{FermentSuffix}.[/gold]
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {IfUpgraded:show:[green]125%[/green]|100%} additional damage for each turn fermented.
ALCHEMIST-CULTURE.title: Culture
ALCHEMIST-DECANT.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ALCHEMIST-DECANT.title: Decant
ALCHEMIST-DECOCTION.description:
Exhaust 1 card.
Procure a random potion.
[gold]Seep[/gold]: Gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-DECOCTION.title: Decoction
ALCHEMIST-DEFEND_ALCHEMIST.title: Defend
ALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The enemy loses 6 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Seep[/gold]: Gain 2 [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-DEPLETE.title: Deplete
ALCHEMIST-DISSOLVE.description: Choose 2 cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillates+[/green]|[gold]Distillates[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
ALCHEMIST-DISTILLATE.title: Distillate
ALCHEMIST-EFFERVESCE.title: Effervesce
ALCHEMIST-EFFLUVIUM.title: Effluvium
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[green]Procure a random potion.[/green]
|}At the start of your turn, procure a random potion.
ALCHEMIST-ELIXIR.title: Elixir
ALCHEMIST-EMERGENCE.title: Emergence
ALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ALCHEMIST-ENERVATE.title: Enervate
ALCHEMIST-ENRICH.description:
[gold]Infuse[/gold] 2 random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {draw:diff()} {draw:plural:card|cards}.
ALCHEMIST-ENRICH.title: Enrich
ALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Transform a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillate+[/green]|[gold]Distillate[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
ALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.
ALCHEMIST-EXPLOIT.title: Exploit
ALCHEMIST-EXUDE.description:
Gain {SelfPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Lose all [gold]Poison[/gold].
Apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-EXUDE.title: Exude
ALCHEMIST-FESTER.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
[gold]Poison[/gold] is triggered against the enemy {triggers:diff()} additional {triggers:plural:time|times} next turn.
ALCHEMIST-FESTER.title: Fester
ALCHEMIST-FLUSH.title: Flush
ALCHEMIST-FUMIGATE.title: Fumigate
ALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.description:
Lose HP equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold]+{Bonus:diff()}.
Deal {IfUpgraded:show:triple|double} that much damage{EnchantBonus}.
ALCHEMIST-HAEMORRHAGE.title: Haemorrhage
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If Fatal, gain {rewards:diff()} additional Potion {rewards:plural:reward|rewards}.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ALCHEMIST-HARVEST.title: Harvest
ALCHEMIST-HOMEOSTASIS.description: At the start of your turn, if your HP is below 50% of your Max HP, draw 1 card and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ALCHEMIST-HOMEOSTASIS.title: Homeostasis
ALCHEMIST-HONE.title: Hone
ALCHEMIST-HORMESIS.title: Hormesis
ALCHEMIST-ICHOR.description: Deal damage equal to your missing HP{EnchantBonus}.
ALCHEMIST-ICHOR.title: Ichor
ALCHEMIST-IMBUE.description: The first time you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold] each turn, [gold]Infuse[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-IMBUE.title: Imbue
ALCHEMIST-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT.description: Whenever you take [gold]Poison[/gold] damage, apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
ALCHEMIST-INDUCEMENT.title: Inducement
ALCHEMIST-INOCULATE.title: Inoculate
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION.description: Whenever you are healed, deal that much damage to ALL enemies {Hits:diff()} {Hits:plural:time|times}.
ALCHEMIST-INVERSION.title: Inversion
ALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Gain {RegenPower:diff()} [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
ALCHEMIST-LIBATION.description:
Procure a random potion.
Gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each potion you have.
ALCHEMIST-LIBATION.title: Libation
ALCHEMIST-MASTERWORK.description:
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If you have [gold]Enchanted[/gold] 7 or more cards this combat, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}, and Exhaust this card.
ALCHEMIST-MASTERWORK.title: Masterwork
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the end of your turn, heal HP equal to half your [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-MERCURIAL_FORM.title: Mercurial Form
ALCHEMIST-METABOLIZE.description:
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn equal to your [gold]Poison[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Procure a random {IfUpgraded:show:Uncommon|Common} potion.
ALCHEMIST-METABOLIZE.title: Metabolize
ALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ALCHEMIST-MORTIFY.title: Mortify
ALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.description:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies and yourself.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Albedo+[/green]|[gold]Albedo[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-NIGREDO.title: Nigredo
ALCHEMIST-OSMOSIS.title: Osmosis
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.description:
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]Regen[/gold] lost.
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.description: Whenever you use a Potion, gain {amount:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {amount:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
ALCHEMIST-PHILTRE.title: Philtre
ALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hits an additional time for each potion you've used this combat.
ALCHEMIST-POTENTIATE.title: Potentiate
ALCHEMIST-POULTICE.title: Poultice
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] twice.
The next time you use a potion this turn, procure another of that type.
ALCHEMIST-PRECIPITATE.title: Precipitate
ALCHEMIST-PRIME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-PRIME.title: Prime
ALCHEMIST-PUNCTURE.title: Puncture
ALCHEMIST-REACTION.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each potion you have.
ALCHEMIST-REACTION.title: Reaction
ALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.description:
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-RECONSTITUTE.title: Reconstitute
ALCHEMIST-REFINE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals additional damage equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-REFINE.title: Refine
ALCHEMIST-REFLUX.description: Whenever another player applies a debuff this turn, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to that enemy.
ALCHEMIST-REFLUX.title: Reflux
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] for each 20 HP you are missing.
ALCHEMIST-RESOLVE.title: Resolve
ALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.description:
Gain {Gold:diff()} Gold.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Procure a random potion.
Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Nigredo+[/green]|[gold]Nigredo[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-RUBEDO.title: Rubedo
ALCHEMIST-SALVE.title: Salve
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION.description: Whenever you take unblocked Attack damage, apply {poison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to the attacker.
ALCHEMIST-SECRETION.title: Secretion
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT.description: Whenever you gain or apply [gold]Poison[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SEDIMENT.title: Sediment
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.description: [gold]Poisoned[/gold] enemies take an additional {percent:diff()}% damage from Attacks.
ALCHEMIST-SEPSIS.title: Sepsis
ALCHEMIST-SINTER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have 7 or more cards in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], this costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)}.
ALCHEMIST-SINTER.title: Sinter
ALCHEMIST-SIPHON.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Draw an additional card.
ALCHEMIST-SIPHON.title: Siphon
ALCHEMIST-SPATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {hits:diff()} times.
Gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SPATTER.title: Spatter
ALCHEMIST-STEEP.title: Steep
ALCHEMIST-STRIKE_ALCHEMIST.title: Strike
ALCHEMIST-SUBLIMATE.description: Transform any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Distillates+[/green]|[gold]Distillates[/gold]}.
ALCHEMIST-SUBLIMATE.title: Sublimate
ALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.description: At the start of your turn, if your HP is between 33-66% of your Max HP, ALL allies procure a random potion.
ALCHEMIST-SUFFUSE.title: Suffuse
ALCHEMIST-SYNTHESIS.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Enchanted[/gold] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-SYNTHESIS.title: Synthesis
ALCHEMIST-TEMPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-TEMPER.title: Temper
ALCHEMIST-TINGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
[gold]Seep[/gold]: Add an [gold]Effluvium[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-TINGE.title: Tinge
ALCHEMIST-TITHE.description:
The first time you lose HP each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Heal 3 HP.
ALCHEMIST-TITHE.title: Tithe
ALCHEMIST-TITRATE.title: Titrate
ALCHEMIST-TRANSMUTATION.description:
[gold]Enchanted[/gold] cards cost 1 less.{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Infuse[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].|}
ALCHEMIST-TRANSMUTATION.title: Transmutation
ALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Regen[/gold].
Lose all [gold]Regen[/gold].
Gain {block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Regen[/gold] lost.
ALCHEMIST-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
ALCHEMIST-VENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Effluvium+[/green]|[gold]Effluvium[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VENT.title: Vent
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional {extraPoison:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VIRULENCE.title: Virulence
ALCHEMIST-VITRIFY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] twice.
Add an {IfUpgraded:show:[green]Effluvium+[/green]|[gold]Effluvium[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-VITRIFY.title: Vitrify
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.description: Whenever you Procure a potion during combat, draw {draw:diff()} {draw:plural:card|cards} and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
ALCHEMIST-WINDFALL.title: Windfall
ALCHEMIST-WINNOW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-WINNOW.title: Winnow
ALCHEMIST-YIELD.description:
Procure a random potion.
[gold]Gambit[/gold]: Procure an additional random potion.
ALCHEMIST-YIELD.title: Yield
